title: Propidium Iodide Nucleic Acid Stain in Euplotes
steps: Collect ˜ 2 ml of Euplotes cells from a culture at 500 cells/ml, concentrate them by centrifugation, 7 min at 3000 rpm and remove the supernatant by pipetting.
Fix Euplotes cells with 1 volume of methanol for 10 min.
Remove as much as possible the solution and wash with 1X PBS (˜1 ml) (washing step can be done by centrifugation).
Add Propidium Iodine 24 µg/ml and let it stain for 30 min.
Wash with 1X PBS (˜1 ml) and remove as much as possible all the solution (washing step can be done by centrifugation).
Put 10 µl of the cells on a slide and observe them under the fluorescent microscope.
creator: Angela Piersanti
